hero.title: Le Jardin
hero.subtitle: Discover an exceptional culinary experience in the heart of Algiers, where tradition meets modernity in every dish.

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: A passion for Mediterranean cuisine
story.paragraph1: Le Jardin was born from a simple yet profound love for Mediterranean cuisine. Founded by Chef Antoine Moreau, a third-generation culinary artist from Marseille with Algerian roots, our restaurant is the culmination of a lifelong journey through the flavors of the Mediterranean basin.
story.paragraph2: After training in some of the most prestigious kitchens in Paris, Barcelona, and Istanbul, Chef Antoine returned to his ancestral homeland to create a dining experience that pays homage to the rich culinary traditions of the region while embracing modern techniques and presentation.
story.paragraph3: Every dish at Le Jardin tells a story — a story of sun-drenched coastlines, bustling souks, family gatherings, and the simple joy of sharing a beautiful meal with loved ones. Our menu changes with the seasons, ensuring that every visit offers something new and exciting.

chef.title: Our Chef
chef.subtitle: A passion, a vision, a signature
chef.name: Chef Karim Benali
chef.bio: Trained alongside the greatest Mediterranean chefs, Karim Benali has traveled across the Mediterranean basin in search of authentic flavors. From Marseille to Beirut, through Barcelona and Tangier, he has captured the essence of each culinary culture to create a unique signature that has made Le Jardin famous.
chef.philosophy: "Cooking is the art of transforming simple ingredients into extraordinary moments."

dishes.title: Signature Dishes
dishes.subtitle: A taste of excellence
dishes.dish1_desc: Slow-cooked lamb with apricots, almonds, and aromatic spices, served with fluffy couscous
dishes.dish2_desc: Traditional Provençal seafood stew with prawns, mussels, fish, and saffron, served with rouille and croutons
dishes.dish3_name: Fondant au Chocolat à la Fleur de Sel
dishes.dish3_desc: Rich chocolate fondant with a molten center, sprinkled with fleur de sel and served with vanilla ice cream

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: A journey of flavors
menu.app1_desc: Grilled sourdough topped with vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh basil, and drizzled with extra virgin olive oil
menu.app2_desc: Lightly battered calamari served with a zesty lemon aioli and micro herbs
menu.app3_desc: Fresh tuna, hard-boiled eggs, olives, and green beans on a bed of mixed greens with anchovy vinaigrette
menu.main1_desc: Slow-cooked lamb with apricots, almonds, and aromatic spices, served with fluffy couscous
menu.main2_desc: Traditional Provençal seafood stew with prawns, mussels, fish, and saffron, served with rouille and croutons
menu.main3_name: Filet de Bar à la Plancha
menu.main3_desc: Pan-seared sea bass with ratatouille, basil oil, and a light tomato beurre blanc
menu.dessert1_name: Fondant au Chocolat à la Fleur de Sel
menu.dessert1_desc: Rich chocolate fondant with a molten center, sprinkled with fleur de sel and served with vanilla ice cream
menu.dessert2_desc: Classic crème brûlée infused with Provençal lavender, topped with caramelized sugar
menu.drink1_desc: Traditional Moroccan mint tea served with delicate pastries
menu.drink2_desc: House-made lemonade with fresh mint and a hint of orange blossom water

reservation.title: Book Your Table
reservation.subtitle: Experience an unforgettable culinary journey
reservation.description: Whether for a romantic dinner, a business lunch or a family celebration, our team will be delighted to welcome you and offer you an exceptional moment.

testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: Their experience speaks for itself
testimonials.test1_text: An exceptional culinary experience! The setting is beautiful, the service impeccable, and every dish is a work of art. The Lamb Tagine is simply divine.
testimonials.test2_text: Le Jardin is without doubt the best Mediterranean restaurant in Algiers. The Royal Bouillabaisse transported me straight to the Marseille coast.
testimonials.test3_text: The atmosphere is warm and elegant. The staff is attentive and knows the menu perfectly. A true culinary gem.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here for you
contact.address: 12 Rue des Jardins, Algiers Center, 16000 Algiers, Algeria
